provider_source.source_of_truth_boundary: AOF runtime artifacts are the session source of truth.

event_summaries.summary: Proceed with v8.7 after review found v8.6 external-write approval overclaim.
Scope v8.7 to approval authenticity and adapter capability alignment before reproduction or rollback proof.
AOF runtime commands opened and completed TASK-107, refreshed release state, regenerated command registry, and executed provider execution approval audit.
Target operation, human approval, approval audit, schemas, CLI commands, tests, and release docs were written.
Focused runtime tests validate positive v8.7 preflight and read-only adapter external-write rejection.
No active TASK-107 blocker remains except final full release verification at record time.
Stop if external-write authorization can pass without adapter capability, human approval authenticity, concrete target, credential scope, budget, rollback, and explicit not-proven boundaries.

risk_candidates: Approval-shaped records can overclaim external-write authority unless adapter capability and human approval authenticity are audited.
decision_candidates: v8.7 is release evidence only when it remains preflight-only and does not claim live provider execution.

redaction_boundary: No secrets, credentials, or external provider payload bodies are included.
release_ready_boundary: Runtime-ready approval authenticity only; not autonomous execution authority.
